case_title: 16TH STREET HOTEL, LLC VS. MEGAN COLLETT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF 16TH STREET HOTEL, LLC
